title: Niklas Fiekas
text: Home * People * Niklas Fiekas Niklas Fiekas , a German chess player and aficionado, open source software developer [1] , and computer scientist affiliated with Clausthal University of Technology [2] . He is primary author of python-chess , a chess library written in Python featuring move generation and validation, PGN reading [3] and opening book reading.
